blended.narrative: Blue Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,241 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F, winds around 21 mph. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.
